commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0ea05d3db0780aaeee221b807b720b6eb8f133c8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds initial and periodic spoken consult progress, changes OpenAI realtime response queuing and barge-in handling, and expands voice-call config, consult-tool, Plugin SDK, provider capability, gateway schema, docs, and tests.

PR surface: Source +321, Tests +456, Docs +7. Total +784 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect: source inspection and the new FIFO serialization test show that a final response waits behind queued continuing responses. A real provider call is still required to measure the resulting spoken delay.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The response-queue defect has a narrow mechanical repair; contributor real-call proof and maintainer approval of the permanent public contracts remain required afterward.
